surface_verification.justification: Fix to the security-scan PreToolUse gate command matcher: it now strips quoted argument spans before substring-matching, so a release-family keyword appearing only inside a justification / commit-message / echo VALUE no longer false-blocks an unrelated finalization command. Hook-logic change + unit/e2e tests; no startable web/api/cli-app surface. Verified by 14 matcher unit tests (quoted-prose vs real command) + an end-to-end no-block regression + the full compliance suite (669 green).

behaviors.behavior: matcher ignores a trigger keyword that appears only inside a quoted argument value (justification/commit-msg/echo) and on unrelated commands
matcher still triggers on real release commands/scripts/paths (vercel, jelastic, fly, railway, npm run, bash *.sh, plugin path)
end-to-end: findings present + keyword only in a quoted arg -> NOT blocked (rc 0)
end-to-end regression-guard: a real release command + findings -> still blocked (rc 2)
